UserSettings.title: User Settings
UserSettings.description: Customizable system settings, wallpapers, and icons for each user.

home_wallpaper.description: Base64 or URL of the home wallpaper.

lock_wallpaper.description: Base64 or URL of the lock wallpaper.

custom_icons.description: Map of boxId to Base64 icon.

custom_icons_keywords.description: Map of boxId to search keyword.
